sentences.arabic: بَدَأَتِ الْحُكُومَةُ مَشْرُوعًا كَبِيرًا لِإِنْتَاجِ الْكَهْرَبَاءِ مِنَ الطَّاقَةِ الشَّمْسِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Vlada je pokrenula veliki projekat za proizvodnju električne energije iz solarne energije.
sentences.translationEn: The government launched a large project to produce electricity from solar energy.

sentences.arabic: رَكَّبَتِ الشَّرِكَةُ الْمَسْؤُولَةُ آلَافَ الْأَلْوَاحِ الشَّمْسِيَّةِ فِي الصَّحْرَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Odgovorna kompanija instalirala je hiljade solarnih panela u pustinji.
sentences.translationEn: The responsible company installed thousands of solar panels in the desert.

sentences.arabic: سَتُوَفِّرُ هَذِهِ الطَّاقَةُ الْكَهْرَبَاءَ لِأَكْثَرِ مِنْ مِائَةِ أَلْفِ مَنْزِلٍ.
sentences.translation: Ova energija će obezbijediti struju za više od stotinu hiljada domova.
sentences.translationEn: This energy will supply electricity to more than one hundred thousand homes.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ وَزِيرُ الطَّاقَةِ إِنَّ هَذَا الْمَشْرُوعَ سَيُقَلِّلُ مِنِ اسْتِخْدَامِ الْوَقُودِ وَسَيَحْمِي الْبِيئَةَ.
sentences.translation: Ministar energetike rekao je da će ovaj projekat smanjiti korišćenje goriva i zaštititi okoliš.
sentences.translationEn: The Minister of Energy said that the project will reduce fuel use and protect the environment.

sentences.arabic: تَعْتَزِمُ الْحُكُومَةُ تَوْسِيعَ الْمَشْرُوعِ لِيَشْمَلَ مُدُنًا أُخْرَى خِلَالَ السَّنَوَاتِ الْقَادِمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Vlada namjerava proširiti projekat na druge gradove u narednim godinama.
sentences.translationEn: The government intends to expand the project to other cities in the coming years.
